---
format: live-html
webr:
  packages:
    - here
---

{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

# Introduction

```{webr setup}
#| include: FALSE

# Declare location
here::i_am("quarto/index.qmd")

# Import packages
library(here)

# Set seed
set.seed(67)
```

This is my code and answers for questions in the [Advanced R (2nd edition) book](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/index.html)

## Motivation

There currently exists an [Advanced R Solutions book](https://advanced-r-solutions.rbind.io/) with clearly worked answers. This workbook retreads the same steps, but with code cells running live in your browser via webR.
